title: Audit repo reference folder for MAP runtime patterns
description: Survey /home/home/Projects/MultiAgentProject/repo reference projects from the 6.13 notes for MAP-useful runtime, memory, compression, orchestration, observability, and command-center patterns. Coordinate with claude-lab-zera to avoid the wikilink/knowledge-graph cluster and produce a durable recommendation artifact.
acceptance_criteria: Artifact inventories inspected reference projects and explicitly distinguishes useful patterns from non-useful/noise.
Artifact recommends concrete MAP follow-up tasks or states no action where adoption is not justified.
Audit avoids copying external code into MAP and treats repo/ as reference-only.
